definition:
1. any light porous substance , ἁλὸς χνόος the foam that gathers at the edge  of the sea, (Odyssey by Homer); πωλικὸς χν. horse's foam , [variant datesAnthology Palantina 
2. the first down on the chin  of youths, Lat. lanugo, (Aristophanes Comicus): the bloom  on fruit, [variant datesAnthology Palantina (ML)
